_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: One cell line (icNF97.2a) has already been published in a study by our group, chosen for its specific mutation repertoire to test an exon skipping approach
details: Cell line has been published in a study testing an exon skipping approach, chosen for its specific mutation repertoire
